entity.summary: Automated market maker and decentralized exchange protocol launched on Ethereum and later expanded across multiple chains. HEI treats Balancer as one protocol-level DEX entity rather than separate records for each version or deployment.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0175 through hei_unadded_0181 as one entity to avoid version/deployment duplication.

events.title: Balancer protocol launch treated as DEX start
events.description: Balancer is recorded as an Ethereum ecosystem AMM and DEX protocol. Version and deployment rows are consolidated into one protocol-level HEI entity.
events.notes: Launch date should be upgraded later if a stronger primary launch announcement is added.

evidence.title: Balancer official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify current Balancer identity.

evidence.title: Balancer documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation used for protocol-level identity.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika / DefiLlama references for Balancer variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0175-0181 contained Balancer deployment/version references.
